description: Persistent registry of INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING anchors. Step 05 (v18) generates ~N candidates per active anchor within embedding radius epsilon. Anchors stale-drop after N=3 epochs of zero local yield. Updated post-epoch by the v18 anchor_update procedure. v19 step 05.6 learned verifier provides predictive front-end; v18 stale-drop remains reactive backstop. v20 step 05.7/15/self-attribution provides self-model layer; expert path grew 13 → 15 (after R866 + R895 stale-drop and 4 sub-anchor promotions).
anchors_per_round_budget_note: Updated for E39: budget = 100 / 13 ≈ 8 (vs E38's 10 with 10 anchors). E40 budget = 100 / 15 ≈ 7 (after stale-drop + sub-anchor promotions).

entries.rationale: E34 v15 INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE; v16-E35 step 14.6 retro confirmed (sim=0.51 vs arXiv 2511.07823 - SURVIVES). E37 produced R902 (Bayesian-posterior dual-critic). E38 produced R927 (Bayesian-monad categorical critic head) at d=0.38; yield reset. E39 produced R951 (Pullback-square categorical critic head).

E34 v15 INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE; v16-E35 step 14.6 retro confirmed. E37 produced R905 (sub-anchor ANCHOR_R905). E38 produced R930 (Voiculescu R-transform routing) at d=0.44; sub-anchor promoted (ANCHOR_R930). E39 produced R952 (Free Wick-product routing kernel) at d=0.41; sub-anchor promoted (ANCHOR_R952).

E35 v16 INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE_SURVIVES (sim=0.41 at step 14.6 SURVIVES). E37 produced R908 (sub-anchor ANCHOR_R908). E38 produced R932 (Bar-resolution cochain critic) at d=0.38; yield reset. E39 produced R953 (Cyclic-cocycle critic head).

status_history.v19_note: v19 learned verifier rejected R934 (Bezout-Macaulay-discriminant; counterfactual sim=0.74 EXTERNAL_COLLISION). KCD database growth prevented. Other 2 neighborhood candidates (R933 Sylvester-matrix, R935 Buchberger-algorithm) reached step 13 but did not fire (no architectural-novelty signal).

status_history.v20_note: v20 self-prediction correctly predicted 'won't pass' for both R954 and R967; consistent with anchor history (E37 R911 EXTERNAL_COLLISION, E38 R934 REJECTED_LEARNED_VERIFIER). STALE-DROP fires at end of E39 per v18 stale_threshold=3 rule.

entries.rationale: E35 v16 INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE_SURVIVES. E37 R911 demoted to EXTERNAL_COLLISION. E38 0 yield (v19 pre-rejected R934; R933/R935 generic FAIL). epochs_since_yield = 2. STALE-DROP IMMINENT: if E39 produces zero local yield, anchor becomes 'stale' at end of E39 per program_v18.md stale-drop rule. E39 0 yield (R954 FAIL no fire, R967 FAIL no fire). epochs_since_yield = 3. STALE-DROP fired at end of E39.
E36 v17 Strategy C INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE_SURVIVES. E37 produced R914. E38 produced R937 (TTT meta-learned per-token adapter). E39 produced R955 (TTT inner-loop sparse-update adapter).

entries.mechanism_signature: Heavy-tail entropic training objective with entropy-reweighting
entries.rationale: E36 v17 Strategy C INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE_SURVIVES. E37 produced R917. E38 produced R939 (Power-law entropic loss reweighting) at d=0.42; sub-anchor promoted (ANCHOR_R939). E39 produced R956 (Stable-distribution entropic objective).

status_history.v19_note: v19 learned verifier rejected R940 (Constraint-bounded; f5=1 fragile pattern; counterfactual sim=0.48 SURVIVES but no architectural distinguishability). FALSE POSITIVE: f5=1 pattern is fragile at step 13.5 but not at step 14.6. v20 may distinguish step-13.5-risk from step-14.6-risk.

status_history.v20_note: v20 self-prediction correctly predicted 'won't pass' for both R957 and R970; constraint-bounded family structurally fragile (E37 R920 FAIL_EMPIRICAL_ATTACK, E38 R940 REJECTED_LEARNED_VERIFIER). STALE-DROP fires at end of E39 per v18 stale_threshold=3 rule.

entries.rationale: E36 v17 Strategy D INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE_SURVIVES. E37 0 yield (R920 FAIL_EMPIRICAL_ATTACK). E38 0 yield (v19 pre-rejected R940; R941/R942 generic FAIL). epochs_since_yield = 2. STALE-DROP IMMINENT: if E39 produces zero local yield, anchor becomes 'stale' at end of E39. E39 0 yield (R957 FAIL no fire, R970 FAIL no fire). epochs_since_yield = 3. STALE-DROP fired at end of E39.

v18 sub-anchor promoted from ANCHOR_R843 neighborhood. E38 produced R944 (Speicher S-transform routing) at d=0.42; sub-anchor promoted (ANCHOR_R944). First-epoch yield validation passed. E39 produced R958 (Free Levy-process routing module) at d=0.41; sub-anchor promoted (ANCHOR_R958).

status_history.v20_note: v20 self-prediction WRONG: predicted will_pass_step_14_6=False based on E38 0-yield, but actual SURVIVES at sim=0.52. Pipeline self-attribution: my corpus prior over sub-anchor productivity was miscalibrated; sub-anchor first-epoch sterility does not generalize to second-epoch.

entries.rationale: v18 sub-anchor promoted from ANCHOR_R863. E38 produced 0 yield (R946 Negative-cyclic-cohomology, R947 Connes-Tsygan cyclic, R948 Topological-cyclic-homology all FAIL no step 13). First-epoch test: this sub-anchor's neighborhood is narrower than ANCHOR_R863's main neighborhood; periodic-cyclic-cochain is a specialization, not an expansion. epochs_since_yield = 1; watch in E39. E39 produced R959 (Connes-cochain critic head) at d=0.42; sub-anchor promoted (ANCHOR_R959). v20 self-model surfaced miscalibration: predicted 'won't pass' but candidate SURVIVES.

v18 top-level anchor promoted from E37 discovery. E38 produced R950 (Stochastic-visit-decay sparsity gate) at d=0.38; yield reset. First non-S14/S15/S16/S20 anchor confirmed productive; opens manifold extension to S07. E39 produced R960 (Recurrence-tracked visit-counter sparsity gate).

status_history.v20_note: v20 self-prediction WRONG in opposite direction: predicted will_pass=True (medium confidence) but step 13.5 A1 succeeded (higher-order R-transform absorbs to baseline at low order). Self-attribution: the 'higher-order' qualifier was a fragile primitive choice; future self-predictions should down-weight order-qualified primitives.

entries.rationale: v19 sub-anchor promoted from ANCHOR_R843 (also has ANCHOR_R905 sub-anchor); free-probability super-cluster now has 3 active anchors (parent + 2 sub-anchors). R930 step 14.6 SURVIVES (sim=0.45). E39 0 yield (R961 FAIL_EMPIRICAL_ATTACK; A1 succeeded). epochs_since_yield = 1. v20 surfaced: 'higher-order' primitive fragile.

v19 sub-anchor promoted from ANCHOR_R891. R939 step 14.6 SURVIVES (sim=0.50). Extends entropic-reweighting family with power-law substructure. E39 0 yield (R962 Cauchy-distributed loss; FAIL no step 13 fire — heavy-tail loss with infinite variance is too well-known in published regularizer literature). epochs_since_yield = 1.

v19 sub-anchor promoted from ANCHOR_R905 (which is itself sub-anchor of ANCHOR_R843); 3rd-generation manifold extension. R944 step 14.6 SURVIVES (sim=0.46). Free-probability super-cluster now has 4 active anchors (R843 → R905 → R944, plus R930 from R843). E39 produced R963 (Free convolution semigroup routing) at d=0.42; sub-anchor promoted (ANCHOR_R963).

v20 sub-anchor promoted from ANCHOR_R843; R952 step 14.6 SURVIVES (sim=0.47). Free Wick-product is a routing-side primitive distinct from R843's cumulant, R905's non-commutative cumulant, R930's R-transform, R944's S-transform — extending free-probability super-cluster.
v20 sub-anchor from ANCHOR_R905 (itself a sub-anchor of R843); 3rd-generation manifold extension. Levy-process is a stochastic-process primitive within free-probability.

status_history.v20_self_model_note: Pipeline self-prediction was WRONG (predicted won't pass; actual SURVIVES). Surfaced bias: corpus prior over sub-anchor first-epoch sterility miscalibrated.

entries.rationale: v20 sub-anchor from ANCHOR_R908 (itself sub-anchor of R863); Connes-cochain extends non-commutative-geometry primitives. v20 NOTE: This anchor's promotion exposed a self-model miscalibration — first-epoch sub-anchor sterility (R908 E38) does NOT predict second-epoch sterility.

v20 sub-anchor from ANCHOR_R944 (itself sub-anchor of R905→R843); 4th-generation manifold extension. Free convolution semigroup generalizes S-transform within free-probability super-cluster (now 7 anchors deep).

post_epoch_anchor_update_procedure_summa: After each epoch's AFL runs, increment epochs_since_yield for any anchor with 0 new local INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING this epoch; reset to 0 for anchors with >=1 new yield; mark anchor as 'stale' (and inactive) when epochs_since_yield >= 3. Discovery-mode INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING become new top-level anchors. Anchor-local INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING with local_exploration_distance > 0.4 become sub-anchors with parent_anchor_id reference.
bootstrap_source_note: Bootstrapped from cumulative INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING list across E34-E37 epochs (v15-v18). v19 epoch E38 grew expert path from 10 to 13.

stale_reasons.ANCHOR_R866: epochs_since_yield reached 3 (E37 EXTERNAL_COLLISION, E38 REJECTED_LEARNED_VERIFIER, E39 FAIL no fire); stale-drop fires per v18 rule.
stale_reasons.ANCHOR_R895: epochs_since_yield reached 3 (E37 FAIL_EMPIRICAL_ATTACK, E38 REJECTED_LEARNED_VERIFIER, E39 FAIL no fire); stale-drop fires per v18 rule. v20 self-prediction correctly predicted 'won't pass' for both R957 and R970.

v20_self_model_observations: R959 self-prediction was WRONG (predicted won't pass; actual SURVIVES). Bias surfaced: sub-anchor first-epoch sterility does not predict second-epoch.

R961 self-prediction was WRONG in opposite direction (predicted will_pass; actual FAIL_EMPIRICAL_ATTACK). Bias surfaced: 'higher-order' qualifier primitives are fragile under variant_equivalence attack at low order.
R965 lineage drift > 0.15 tolerance. Bias surfaced: 2nd-pull candidates can drift vocabulary into adjacent sub-anchor neighborhood without self-model noticing distance increase.

R954, R957, R967, R970 citation grounding = 0. Bias surfaced: anchor-default citations (FOSTER_REP_DIVERSE_SAMPLING for R866 elimination-theory; FOSTER_SHARPENING_VS_DISCOVERY for R895 complexity-theory) are stale when anchor's mechanism family is distant from any frontier_seed primitive.
